creator: pst@Shockwave.COM
text:
System goes to create filesystems in /mnt but fails due to the inability
to create an inode for /dev/rwd0a in /dev.

(in the background, we see: / create/symlink failed, no inodes free)

Fix: 

Pad in a few more inodes when building the MFS
How-To-Repeat: 
Install from boot.flp as of today.
